title: 4 Pack Squeeze Bottle - 8oz / 250ML Plastic Squeezy Sauce Bottles with Cap, Squeeze Condiment Bottle Dispensing Ketchup Bottle for Sauce,BBQ,Salad Dressing,Paint,Oil,Icing,Liquids,Art,Crafts,Glue
features: Versatile: These 4 pack squeeze bottles can be used for a variety of purposes such as dispensing condiments, sauces, oils, and dressings. Perfect for both home and commercial use.
Easy to Use: The wide mouth design of the bottles makes it easy to fill and clean. The squeeze bottle also features a tight-fitting cap that prevents leaks and spills.

Durable and Safe: Made from high-quality food-grade plastic, these squeeze bottles are BPA free and can withstand the wear and tear of everyday use. The bottles are also reusable, making them an eco-friendly option.

Perfect size: Each bottle can hold up to 8 ounces of any liquid. The size is small enough to be portable and easy to handle, yet large enough to hold a sufficient amount of liquid to avoid frequent refills.

Convenient and Stylish: These squeeze bottles are designed in an appealing clear color, making it easy to identify the contents inside. Also, the four pack comes with a convenient tray to hold all the bottles together, ensuring they are always within reach when you need them
description: 4 Pack Squeeze Bottle - 8oz / 250ML Plastic Squeezy Sauce Bottles with Cap, Squeeze Condiment Bottle Dispensing Ketchup Bottle for Sauce,BBQ,Salad Dressing,Paint,Oil,Icing,Liquids,Art,Crafts,Glue
